title: LA SFR — Type V-B with explicit per-story area over 7000 sf R-3 limit
notes: Tests the deterministic IBC Table 506.2 numeric check on a clear over-limit case.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 456 HILLTOP DR
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 1
Building height: 18 ft
Total building area: 8,500 sf
Per-story area: 8,500 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes
Design occupant load: 12
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical service: 400 A main breaker
WC 3, LAV 3
EXIT 1 (main)
EXIT 2 (kitchen)
NFPA 13D residential sprinklers
NFPA 72 smoke alarms

ground_truth.rationale: 8500 sf exceeds 7000 sf Table 506.2 R-2/V-B without frontage or NFPA 13 increases
